overall.description: A first-person exploration through a dark, desolate landscape dominated by massive twisted rock spires under a night sky. The footage appears to be from a video game, featuring cinematic low-light atmosphere with blue-purple tones as the camera moves steadily through a narrow rock corridor that gradually opens to reveal distant mountains.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward through the dark, enclosed corridor of twisted rock spires

entered.detail: tall, jagged rock formations towering immediately to the left, creating a wall-like barrier
tall, jagged rock formations towering immediately to the right, creating a wall-like barrier
thin strip of dark night sky visible between the rock spires ahead
uneven dirt and rock ground surface beneath the camera

segments.scene_description: The segment opens deep within a narrow corridor formed by massive twisted rock spires that loom immediately on both sides. The environment is extremely dark with only a thin strip of night sky visible ahead. The camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed passage, with no vegetation visible in this desolate rock formation.

events.description: rock corridor begins to widen, revealing more sky and distant landscape ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the enclosed passage gradually opens up, revealing sparse vegetation

entered.detail: leafless, skeletal tree branches visible on the right side against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, the tight rock corridor gradually widens into a semi-covered transition zone. The twisted spires move from immediate proximity to mid-distance on both sides, while bare dead trees become visible on the right. The sky becomes more visible overhead as the enclosed feeling begins to dissipate.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland with distant mountain silhouette

events.description: exits the rock corridor completely into open landscape with distant mountains visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: approaching the open vista with distant mountains visible ahead between the spreading rock formations

entered.detail: dark silhouette of mountain peaks visible on the horizon beneath the night sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide wasteland as the camera exits the rock corridor. The twisted spires now frame the scene from a distance on both sides, while a distant mountain range becomes visible on the horizon. Bare trees pass by on the right as the camera moves toward the open vista under the expansive night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic rock corridor that gradually opens into a vast, desolate wasteland under a night sky. It begins deep within a narrow passage formed by massive twisted spires that loom on both sides, leaving only a thin strip of sky visible ahead. As the camera progresses, the tight corridor widens into a semi-covered transition zone where the spires recede into the mid-distance and bare, dead trees appear on the right. The scene then expands fully as the camera exits the rock formation, shifting from an enclosed space to an open vista. Finally, the twisted spires frame the edges of the landscape while the camera moves past the remaining dead trees toward a distant mountain range on the horizon.
